markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Senegal records above 3.5 goals in the Belgium vs Senegal professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 1, 2026 after 90 minutes plus stoppage time (does not include extra time or penalties), then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to Senegal in the Belgium vs Senegal professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 1, 2026 after 90 minutes plus stoppage time (does not include extra time or penalties). Own goals count towards the team awarded the goal.
markets.title: Will Senegal score over 3.5 goals?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Tyler Callihan records 3+ hits in the Pittsburgh vs Philadelphia professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 1, 2026 at 6:40 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Tyler Callihan is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Tyler Callihan starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Tyler Callihan is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Tyler Callihan is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Tyler Callihan: 3+ hits?
